sections.notes: Existing breadcrumb block with levels property. Auto-generates from URL path.
Optional. Present on some content-article pages, absent on others. Uses desktop/mobile image pair from .banner-article.
Default content in grey section. h3 heading + ul list of sibling page links. Current page has no link (plain text).

content.pattern: ul of sibling page links, current page as plain text li

sections.notes: Main article body. Rich text content: headings (h1 title, h4 subheadings), paragraphs, inline links, lists, tables, images. All rendered as default content - no blocks needed.

content.pattern: Rich text with inline links, strong, em
HTML table for structured data (schedules, lists)

sections.notes: Optional. Card tiles at bottom of some pages. Uses existing cards block with standard variant (no images) or compact variant (with images). Blue section style drives colour.

blockInventory.notes: All blocks needed for content-article pages already exist. No new blocks or variants required.

aboutUs: A New Constitution for Tennis NSW

subNavigation.notes: Some sub-sections have their own Also In nav (e.g., 'Also in Thriving Tennis Venues', 'Also in Competitive Play', 'Also in Member Protection'). The nav heading and items come from the parent page's sidebar.
